trends.name: Korean Ssam Bar Snacks
trends.short descriptor: Lettuce, ssamjang, sizzling picks — the table refuses to quiet down.
trends.moveCopy: Wrap it, drag it through sauce, repeat.
trends.WHY IT'S HITTING:
Built for grazing, not committing.
Every bite gets a little messier.
Late-night food with actual structure.
WHAT TO ORDER: Pork belly ssam with perilla leaf, rice, and ssamjang — build it yourself, eat it in one bite
trends.MOST SPOTTED:
Dan Sung Sa (Koreatown)
Jilli (Koreatown)
Yangban Society (Arts District)
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Yangban Society — bigger spread, more composed plates
trends.EASY ENTRY: Dan Sung Sa — late-night anju bar energy, endless small plates to wrap
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Korean Ssam Bar Snacks” (query “Korean Ssam Bar Snacks Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.5 · ~5389 review rollups. Open listings (aggregated): 400 open listings across 8 mapped search slices blended avg ★4.3 · ~145683 review volume indexed. “Korean Ssam Bar Snacks”: 50 open (★2.4); “Korean food”: 50 open (★4.5); “Aguachile on Ice”: 50 open (★4.6); “Olive Oil Dessert Loops”: 50 open (★4.8).

trends.name: Sonoran-Style Breakfast Burritos
trends.short descriptor: Blistered flour tortilla, egg, potato, machaca — morning belt-buckle fuel.
trends.WHY IT'S HITTING:
The flour tortilla is doing real work.
Breakfast, but with road-trip energy.
Salsa decides the whole thing.
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Cilantro Mexican Grill (Glassell Park) — Bacon-egg blistered tortilla roll
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Sonoran-Style Breakfast Burritos” (query “Sonoran-Style Breakfast Burritos Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.3 · ~11852 review rollups. Open listings (aggregated): 400 open listings across 8 mapped search slices blended avg ★4.5 · ~149884 review volume indexed. “Sonoran-Style Breakfast Burritos”: 50 open (★4.1); “Olive Oil Dessert Loops”: 50 open (★4.8); “sandwiches”: 50 open (★4.4); “bagels”: 50 open (★4.1).

trends.name: Hainan Chicken Lunch Counters
trends.short descriptor: Poached bird, schmaltz-y rice, sauce trio — counter-speed SGV lunch.
trends.WHY IT'S HITTING:
The chicken is quiet; the rice does the talking.
It feels clean, but still fully lunch.
Sauces turn one plate into three moods.
WHAT TO ORDER: Hainan chicken rice — poached bird, chicken-fat rice, ginger-scallion oil
Three-sauce tray — chile, ginger-scallion, sweet dark soy
Extra chicken rice side — lunch-counter refill culture
trends.MOST SPOTTED:
Savoy Kitchen (Alhambra) — Hainan chicken rice, three-sauce tray
Cluck2Go (Pasadena) — fast lunch-counter rice plate
Pearl River Deli (Chinatown) — Chinatown Hainan counter line culture
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Savoy Kitchen (Alhambra) — full Hainan chicken lunch set with sauces and rice
trends.EASY ENTRY: Cluck2Go (Pasadena) — counter-style rice plate, fast daytime turns
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Hainan Chicken Lunch Counters” (query “Hainan Chicken Lunch Counters Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.3 · ~6710 review rollups. Open listings (aggregated): 399 open listings across 8 mapped search slices blended avg ★4.3 · ~159925 review volume indexed. “Hainan Chicken Lunch Counters”: 49 open (★3.5); “new restaurant”: 50 open (★4.3); “Japanese food”: 50 open (★4.4); “Vietnamese food”: 50 open (★4.2).

trends.name: Aguachile on Ice
trends.short descriptor: Shrimp in an electric lime-chile bath — colder than your beer, louder than small talk.
trends.moveCopy: Order it cold, eat it first.
trends.WHY IT'S HITTING:
It hits before the table even settles.
Citrus, chile, ice — LA's holy trinity.
Light enough to keep the night moving.
WHAT TO ORDER: Shrimp aguachile verde — heavy lime, serrano heat, sliced cucumber, served ice-cold with tostadas.
trends.MOST SPOTTED: Holbox (Downtown LA) — Shrimp aguachile verde — heavy lime, serrano heat, sliced cucumber, served ice-cold with tostadas.
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Holbox — pristine seafood, deeper citrus, cleaner heat.
trends.EASY ENTRY: Mariscos Jalisco — faster, louder, and just as craveable.
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Aguachile on Ice” (query “Aguachile on Ice Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.4 · ~20598 review rollups. Open listings (aggregated): 400 open listings across 8 mapped search slices blended avg ★4.5 · ~111111 review volume indexed. “Aguachile on Ice”: 50 open (★4.6); “Natural Wine “Martini” Hour”: 50 open (★4.5); “new restaurant”: 50 open (★4.3); “Filipino food”: 50 open (★4.2).

trends.name: Natural Wine “Martini” Hour
trends.short descriptor: Orange wine in a stem, martini brain, golden hour spilling onto the sidewalk.
trends.WHY IT'S HITTING:
It scratches the cocktail itch without going full cocktail.
Salty, cold, bitter — very pre-dinner.
Makes 6 p.m. feel like a plan.
WHAT TO ORDER: Skin-contact white or chilled red — served cold, slightly cloudy, poured fast and refilled often
Skin-contact white or chilled red — served cold, slightly cloudy, poured fast and refilled often
Martini or spritz round — aperitivo pacing with funky wine still in rotation
trends.MOST SPOTTED: Bar Bandini (Echo Park); Tabula Rasa (Silver Lake); Donna's (Echo Park)
trends.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Bar Bandini (Echo Park) — deeper list, more interesting pours, slower vibe
trends.EASY ENTRY: Tabula Rasa (Silver Lake) — approachable, louder, easy to slide into
trends.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Natural Wine “Martini” Hour” (query “Natural Wine “Martini” Hour Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.6 · ~13107 review rollups. Open listings (aggregated): 400 open listings across 8 mapped search slices blended avg ★4.5 · ~123049 review volume indexed. “Natural Wine “Martini” Hour”: 50 open (★4.5); “matcha”: 50 open (★4.4); “coffee”: 50 open (★4.4); “new restaurant”: 50 open (★4.3).

aboutToHit.name: Olive Oil Dessert Loops
aboutToHit.short descriptor: Whipped mascarpone, citrus, and grassy olive oil looping onto cakes and soft-serve on dessert-only cards.
aboutToHit.WHY IT'S HITTING:
Guests still want that 'clean' dessert shot.
Olive oil reads fancy without chocolate.
Pastry teams trial it on weekends first.
WHAT TO ORDER: Whipped ricotta olive oil dip dessert
aboutToHit.MOST SPOTTED: Botanica Restaurant (Silver Lake) — Olive oil soft serve swirl
aboutToHit.WORTH THE SPLURGE: République Café (Mid-Wilshire) — Whipped ricotta olive oil dip dessert
aboutToHit.EASY ENTRY: Botanica Restaurant (Silver Lake) — Olive oil soft serve swirl
aboutToHit.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Olive Oil Dessert Loops” (query “Olive Oil Dessert Loops Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.5 · ~6041 review rollups. aboutToHit.name: Filipino BBQ Skewer Nights
aboutToHit.short descriptor: Sweet-savory pork and chicken skewer platters with calamansi, garlic rice, and banana ketchup nods on patio menus.
aboutToHit.WHY IT'S HITTING:
Patios want a pile of sticks on the table.
Breweries like loud, shareable protein.
Trays slide across outdoor seating.
aboutToHit.MOST SPOTTED: LASA Supper Club (Chinatown) — Calamansi-glazed pork stick
aboutToHit.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Highland Park Brewery (Chinatown) — Garlic rice family tray
aboutToHit.EASY ENTRY: LASA Supper Club (Chinatown) — Calamansi-glazed pork stick
aboutToHit.evidenceSummary: Google Places (weekend): 20 result(s) for “Filipino BBQ Skewer Nights” (query “Filipino BBQ Skewer Nights Los Angeles”) · avg rating 4.4 · ~6116 review rollups. aboutToHit.name: Ube Basque Cheesecake Slices
aboutToHit.short descriptor: Burnt tops, purple yam custard centers, and Filipino-dessert crossovers landing on pastry cases from Sawtelle to Long Beach.
aboutToHit.WHY IT'S HITTING:
Purple cakes still crush on the feed.
Tiny kitchens can trial it Saturday only.
Low stakes before full dessert menus.
aboutToHit.WORTH THE SPLURGE: Smorgasburg pastry stalls (Downtown LA) — Pandan swirl cheesecake
